name: canonical_taxonomy
description: The canonical category taxonomy. map_to_canonical_taxonomy fuzzy-matches each supplier's free-text category to the closest path here.
_TODO_step_4: Set confident_threshold and review_threshold (0–100 fuzzy scores; confident > review).
Fill `paths` with the canonical category strings suppliers map into (e.g. 'Apparel > Footwear').
Cover the categories implied by the sample feeds (footwear, outerwear, audio, accessories, fitness, ...).
The `retail-solution` branch holds the reference taxonomy.
